mapper.select: SELECT FROM lesson_bookmarks ORDER BY created_at DESC, bookmark_id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM lesson_bookmarks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND lesson_id = #{lessonId}
mapper.select: SELECT lb.bookmark_id AS bookmark_id, lb.lesson_id AS lesson_id, l.title AS lesson_title, cn.node_id AS node_id, cn.title AS node_title, cn.subject_id AS subject_id, cn.level_code AS level_code, lb.created_at AS bookmarked_at FROM lesson_bookmarks lb JOIN lessons l ON l.lesson_id = lb.lesson_id JOIN curriculum_nodes cn ON cn.node_id = l.node_id WHERE lb.user_id = #{userId} AND cn.subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY lb.created_at DESC, lb.bookmark_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
